title: besseya reflexa
intro: Besseya reflexa, also known as the reflexed beesian, is a flowering plant species in the family Plantaginaceae, native to the western United States. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Besseya reflexa can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used in herbal remedies. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Besseya reflexa for medicinal purposes.
